title: Captain 'Remind Availability' button
description: Add a button that any captain can press to remind players to update their availability for the upcoming week. Crucially, the reminder is only sent to players who have NOT already submitted their availability for that week. Players without push notifications enabled are skipped.
acceptance_criteria: A 'Remind Players' button appears on the fixture detail page or a captain-accessible page for the upcoming week
Clicking the button queries which players have NOT yet submitted availability for the relevant week/fixture
Push notifications are sent ONLY to those players who: (a) haven't updated availability AND (b) have push notifications enabled
Notification body: 'Please update your availability for {date} — {opponent}' (or similar)
Notification click opens the player's availability page
Button shows success feedback: 'Reminded X players (Y already updated, Z have no notifications)'
Players who have already submitted availability are NOT notified
Button is only visible to captains/admins
HTMX-powered: button posts to endpoint and swaps in the result message

backend_logic: Get the fixture and its week/season
Get all players eligible for this fixture's team
Query player_availability table to find who HAS submitted for this week
Subtract to get the list of players who HAVEN'T submitted
For each non-submitted player, look up their fantasy token and push subscription
Send reminder via webpush.SendToPlayer(token, title, body, data)
Collect results: reminded, already updated, no subscription
Return HTMX partial with result summary

notification_payload.title: Availability Reminder
notification_payload.body: Please update your availability for {team} vs {opponent} on {date}

technical_notes.key_query: SELECT players who are on the team but do NOT have a row in player_availability for the given week and season
existing_infrastructure: player_availability table tracks per-player, per-week availability
AvailabilityRepository likely has methods to query availability status
Fixture -> Team -> Players relationship is established

testing_requirements: Test that only players WITHOUT availability are reminded
Test that players WITH availability are NOT reminded
Test that players without push subscriptions are skipped
Test feedback message shows correct breakdown (reminded/updated/no-subscription)
Test notification content includes correct fixture details
Test notification click opens correct availability URL
Test button only visible to captains/admins

context.user_story: As a captain, I want to press a button to remind players who haven't updated their availability, so I have the information I need to select teams
